channel.title: Earnings Call Strategic Briefings
channel.description: Weekly strategic briefings distilled from earnings call transcripts. Covers long-term strategy, culture, org structure, and competitive positioning — no quarterly noise.
channel.itunes:author: Arjun's Earnings Agent
channel.itunes:summary: Weekly strategic briefings distilled from earnings call transcripts. Covers long-term strategy, culture, org structure, and competitive positioning — no quarterly noise.

item.title: How Wise is Replacing the SWIFT Network
item.description: A deep dive into Wise's mission to build a new cross-border payments infrastructure — how they are challenging the 50-year-old SWIFT network, building their own correspondent banking relationships, and what it means for the future of global money movement.

item.title: Inside Adyen's Trillion Euro Payment Engine
item.description: An exploration of Adyen's unified commerce platform — how they built a payments infrastructure that processes trillions in volume for merchants like Netflix, Spotify, and McDonald's, and why their single-platform architecture is so difficult to replicate.

item.title: WOODS Conf Prep
item.description: Conference preparation briefing — Greek turnarounds and Eurasian super apps.

item.title: VEEV — The Digital Nervous System of Global Pharma
item.description: Veeva Systems: The Digital Nervous System of Global Pharma. A deep dive covering Veeva's role as the operating platform for life sciences — Commercial Cloud, Development Cloud, the Vault CRM migration, and competitive dynamics.

item.title: VEEV Deep Dive — Five Banks, Four Years
item.description: Synthesizes equity research from five major banks spanning 2022–2026, examining Veeva's business model, the Vault CRM migration, competitive threats, and financial performance narrative.

item.title: VEEV Deep Dive — Cowen Research
item.description: A deep dive on Veeva Systems based on Cowen equity research from December 2022. Covers the business model, Vault CRM migration, competitive landscape, and long-term growth thesis.

item.title: VEEV Q4 2026 Strategic Briefing
item.description: Veeva Systems Strategic Briefing. Fiscal Q4 2026 Earnings Call. Covers the Vault CRM migration, AI philosophy, trust and culture, the evolving product portfolio, and where the company is headed over the next decade.

item.title: AAPL Q1 2026 Podcast
item.description: Apple Earnings Breakdown — Q1 Fiscal 2026. A two-host deep dive into Apple's record-breaking fiscal first quarter ending December 2025, covering revenue, services growth, and strategic outlook.
